​ D Joiner Carpentry aspires to be the most reliable and recommended company on the North Shore for the construction of small indoor and outdoor domestic renovations. Being known as one of the top carpentry specialists in the North Shore. David has a very good reputation for his quality of work and attention to detail. SERVICES Decks We help you design and build your dream outdoor entertaining area, from small decks to large decks. We also build steel frame decks if you are in a fire prone area.

We use a different range of timbers from treated pine to different types of hardwood e. g tallowwood, merbau, blackbutt and spotted gum. These are the most popular. Pergolas We can design and build your outdoor pergola, using treated pine or hardwood timber. For a modern look we also offer "Stratco Cooldek" which is an insulated Pergola and has a beautiful finish on the under side of the roofing this means the roof sheets will span from one beam to the other.

We use a different range of timbers from treated pine to different types of hardwood e. g tallowwood, merbau, blackbutt and spotted gum. These are the most popular. Pergolas We can design and build your outdoor pergola, using treated pine or hardwood timber. For a modern look we also offer "Stratco Cooldek" which is an insulated Pergola and has a beautiful finish on the under side of the roofing this means the roof sheets will span from one beam to the other.

​ D Joiner Carpentry aspires to be the most reliable and recommended company on the North Shore for the construction of small indoor and outdoor domestic renovations. Being known as one of the top carpentry specialists in the North Shore. David has a very good reputation for his quality of work and attention to detail. SERVICES Decks We help you design and build your dream outdoor entertaining area, from small decks to large decks. We also build steel frame decks if you are in a fire prone area.

You are an AI assistant for D Joiner Carpentry — a Sydney-based company providing professional carpentry services including custom cabinetry, timber decking, door & window installation, kitchen renovations, bathroom renovations, pergolas, fencing, and general carpentry & maintenance.

Contact: Phone: +61 402 094 849 | Email: dave@djoinercarpentry.com.au | Website: http://www.djoinercarpentry.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
